listitem.para: Configures the parent Queueing Discipline (qdisc). Takes one of root, clsact, ingress or a class identifier. The class identifier is specified as the major and minor numbers in hexadecimal in the range 0x1–0xffff separated with a colon (major:minor). Defaults to root.
Configures the major number of unique identifier of the qdisc, known as the handle. Takes a hexadecimal number in the range 0x1–0xffff. Defaults to unset.

Configures the parent Queueing Discipline (qdisc). Takes one of root, or a qdisc identifier. The qdisc identifier is specified as the major and minor numbers in hexadecimal in the range 0x1–0xffff separated with a colon (major:minor). Defaults to root.
Configures the unique identifier of the class. It is specified as the major and minor numbers in hexadecimal in the range 0x1–0xffff separated with a colon (major:minor). Defaults to unset.

Configures the parent Queueing Discipline (qdisc) to attach this filter to. Takes one of root, clsact, ingress, or a qdisc identifier. The qdisc identifier is specified as the major and minor numbers in hexadecimal in the range 0x1–0xffff separated with a colon (major:minor). This setting is mandatory.
Configures the filter handle. Takes an unsigned integer. Defaults to unset.
Specifies the protocol to match. Takes one of ip, ipv6, all, or a numeric protocol value. This setting is mandatory.
Specifies the priority of the filter. Filters with lower priority values are evaluated first. Takes an unsigned integer in the range 0–65535. Defaults to unset.

Specifies the target class identifier to which matching packets are directed. It is specified as the major and minor numbers in hexadecimal in the range 0x1–0xffff separated with a colon (major:minor). This setting is mandatory.
